textPlain: Looks very comfy, I am glad there is so many new alternatives to manage deployments a la Heroku. I remember even back in 2018 it was hard to find any good options to beat Heroku's level of functionality.I made a Dokku wrapper myself and manage my deployments that way, I'm pretty happy about it these days, but again it's nice to see more alternatives in the wild.
This looks very sleek but coolify.io is also open source and a more mature project in my opinion.
I’d be glad if you can share a source of that.
